name: Pineapple-Raisin Jumble
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Dole Crushed Pineapple in juice (8 oz each)
1 cup Dole Blanched Slivered Almonds, toasted
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple well, pressing out excess liquid with the back of a spoon.
2. Reserve the juice for beverage use.
3. Beat the margarine and sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy. Stir in the drained pineapple and vanilla extract.
4. Beat in the flour and orange peel. Stir in the toasted almonds and raisins.
5. Drop by heaping tablespoonfuls, about 2 inches apart, onto ungreased cookie sheets.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 20-22 minutes until firm. Cool on wire racks.
7. Makes 2 to 2 1/2 dozen cookies.
